features: Durable 200gsm Kraft Paper – Each Christmas wine gift bag is crafted from premium 200gsm kraft paper, providing strength and sturdiness to hold full wine bottles without tearing.
Perfect Bottle-Specific Fit – These tall and narrow bags securely hold standard wine bottles. The reinforced base adds extra support for safe gifting and carrying.
Comfortable Rope Handles – Each wine bag comes with strong rope handles for easy transport, ensuring a comfortable grip while carrying your bottles to holiday gatherings or parties.
Festive Holiday Design – Featuring elegant Christmas prints, these wine bottle bags are perfect for holiday celebrations, gift exchanges, or as stylish packaging for wine, champagne, or spirits.
Eco-Friendly & Recyclable – Made with recyclable kraft paper, these gift bags are a sustainable choice for Christmas packaging, combining festive style with an environmentally conscious design.
